name: Patient Case
history: Involvement in a complex romantic situation with a person named Cleo. Cleo is in a long-distance relationship while also engaging with the patient.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't provide support, I will be abandoned.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough to be chosen.
coping_strategies: Providing emotional support to feel needed and avoid rejection.
situation: During an outing, Cleo discussed relationship problems and sought emotional support.
auto_thought: I need to help Cleo, or I will lose them.
behavior: Offering emotional support and reassurance to Cleo.
